definition:
1. to moan, sigh, groan , (Homer) 
2. with genitive to moan  or sigh for , (Euripides); ὑπέρ τινος (Aeschulus Tragicus); τινί or ἐπί τινι (Euripides); with accusative cognate, πένθος οἰκεῖον στ. (Sophocles Tragicus):—;Mid., (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. with accusative to bewail, lament , (Aeschulus Tragicus), etc.; στένειν τινὰ τῆς τύχης to pity  him for  his ill fortune, (Aeschulus Tragicus): so in Mid., στένεσθαί τινα (Euripides) (ML)
